chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-1146 of 2020 ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1. For order on CMA No.21565/2021 (U/A) 2. For order on CMA No.21566/2021 (U/o.23, R-1) 3. For hearing of CMA No.5366/2020 (stay) 4. For hearing of main case. 01.09.2021 M/s. Malik Khushal Khan, & Syed Saleem Ahmed, advocates for the Petitioner. ------ Counsel for the petitioner under instructions of his client wants to withdraw this petition unconditionally. The instant petition stands disposed of as withdrawn unconditionally along with the pending applications, if any. JUDGE JUDGE SM
